overall.description: A cinematic exploration of Ravenclaw Tower from Hogwarts Legacy, beginning on an outdoor Gothic terrace with mountain views, proceeding through an eagle-adorned entrance door, and revealing the house common room with its distinctive circular layout, astronomical ceiling decorations, and students in wizard robes.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic castle terrace with pointed arches overlooking mountain valley

agents.ego_description: slowly panning across the stone terrace, admiring the Gothic arcade columns and distant mountain scenery

entered.detail: ornate stone arcade with pointed Gothic arches and columns
trimmed spherical bushes in stone planters
misty mountain landscape visible through the arcade openings
tall pointed towers of the castle complex
circular stone fountain with sculpted details

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stone terrace of Ravenclaw Tower, featuring Gothic arches framing a misty mountain landscape. The camera moves slowly across the paved surface, passing trimmed topiary bushes and a central stone fountain, with castle spires visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor leading to Ravenclaw entrance door

events.description: scene cuts from outdoor terrace to indoor stone corridor
camera slows and zooms toward the bronze eagle door knocker

agents.ego_description: moving through the narrow stone corridor toward the ornate wooden door with the bronze eagle knocker

entered.detail: intricate bronze sculpture of an eagle with spread wings holding a ring
rough-hewn stone blocks with wall-mounted lanterns
dark wooden door with Gothic arched top

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an indoor stone corridor with rough-hewn walls and warm lantern light. The camera approaches the Ravenclaw entrance, focusing on the intricate bronze eagle door knocker as it fills the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular entry chamber with massive stone eagle sculpture

events.description: door opens revealing the grand entry hall with the giant stone eagle
camera begins descending the curved staircase into the chamber

agents.ego_description: descending the curved stairs into the circular chamber while observing the massive stone eagle sculpture and students standing nearby

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes standing with arms crossed near the eagle statue
student in dark robes standing still against the wall

entered.detail: massive wall-mounted stone sculpture of an eagle with outstretched wings
ceiling painted with stars and constellations against dark blue
stairs with blue carpet descending into the chamber

segments.scene_description: The door opens to reveal a circular chamber dominated by a massive stone eagle sculpture on the far wall beneath a star-painted ceiling. The camera descends blue-carpeted stairs where two students in dark robes stand observing the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular common room with central fireplace and astronomical ceiling

events.description: entering the main common room area from the entry hall
camera tilts upward to reveal the detailed astronomical ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room, observing the furniture and students, then looking up at the intricate wooden ceiling structure

notable_agents.action: student in red robes standing near an archway entrance
student sitting in an armchair reading near the windows

entered.detail: octagonal wooden structure with open fires burning inside
large brass astronomical instrument with rings and spheres
tall pointed windows with diamond-patterned glass
tall shelves filled with books lining the curved walls
wooden ceiling with painted astronomical charts and hanging lanterns

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the main Ravenclaw common room, a circular space with a central wooden fireplace, brass armillary sphere, and tall Gothic windows. Students in robes are scattered throughout, some sitting in armchairs while others walk about. The camera pans upward to reveal the stunning astronomical ceiling with wooden beams and painted constellations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty outdoor terrace into the celestial grandeur of the Ravenclaw common room. It begins on a stone terrace where Gothic arches frame a mountain landscape, gliding past trimmed topiary and a central fountain toward the castle's interior. As the camera moves inside, the open air shifts to a dim stone corridor lit by warm lanterns, drawing closer until an intricate bronze eagle door knocker fills the frame. The scene then opens into a circular chamber featuring a massive stone eagle sculpture and a star-painted ceiling, descending blue-carpeted stairs past students in dark robes. Finally, the camera enters the main common room, passing a central fireplace and brass armillary sphere before panning upward to reveal the wooden beams and painted constellations of the astronomical ceiling.
